elements.title: Flatiron Building
elements.contents: ... that past tenants of New York City's Flatiron Building (pictured) have included a consulate, musicians, and a crime syndicate?

elements.title: Mo'Kalamity
elements.contents: ... that reggae musician Mo'Kalamity derives her stage name from American frontierswoman Calamity Jane?

elements.title: Endeavor: Deep Sea
elements.contents: ... that the board game Endeavor: Deep Sea, in which players lead a group of marine-life specialists, won the industry Connoisseurs' Game of the Year award?

elements.title: 2026 China–US summit
elements.contents: ... that, for the 2026 China–US summit, China used a transliteration of the US Secretary of State's name beginning with a character meaning 'reckless', 'clumsy', or 'crass'?

elements.title: Colin Queen
elements.contents: ... that Lamborghini-supported Colin Queen is a racing driver despite having a congenital heart defect?

elements.title: Rochdale v York City in April 2026
elements.contents: ... that Rochdale v York City in April 2026 was the first time that a single English football league match was a title-decider since Liverpool faced Arsenal in May 1989?

elements.title: a teenager murdered in 2013
elements.contents: ... that a Buenos Aires public square was renamed in honor of a teenager murdered in 2013?

elements.title: Leon Milton Birkhead
elements.contents: ... that, after doctors told him he had a year to live, Leon Milton Birkhead went into debt to visit Nazi Germany?
